{
    /// <summary>
    /// <para>Generated from:</para>
    /// <code>
    /// [Projectable]
    /// public GradeDto(int score)
    /// {
    ///     if (score &gt;= 90)
    ///     {
    ///         Grade = "A";
    ///     }
    ///     else if (score &gt;= 75)
    ///     {
    ///         Grade = "B";
    ///     }
    ///     else if (score &gt;= 60)
    ///     {
    ///         Grade = "C";
    ///     }
    ///     else
    ///     {
    ///         Grade = "F";
    ///     }
    /// }
    /// </code>
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    static class Foo_GradeDto__ctor_P0_int
    {
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<int, global::Foo.GradeDto>> Expression()
        {
            return (int score) => new global::Foo.GradeDto()
            {
                Grade = score >= 90 ? "A" : score >= 75 ? "B" : score >= 60 ? "C" : "F"
            };
        }
    }
}
